sources.name: AIS Anomaly
sources.scoreExplanation: Multiple AIS gap events and unexpected route deviations detected near restricted waters.
sources.positionConfidenceExplanation: AIS transponder reports are consistent with coastal receivers; satellite cross-check pending.

sources.name: Coast Guard
sources.scoreExplanation: Flagged by regional coast guard for irregular anchorage but no confirmed incident.
sources.positionConfidenceExplanation: Radar contact fused with AIS; position corroborated by nearby port authorities.

sources.name: Lloyd's List
sources.scoreExplanation: Listed as a vessel of interest; no active sanctions match but historical association recorded.
sources.positionConfidenceExplanation: Position derived from third-party registry records; live signal not directly observed.

sources.name: Radar Fusion
sources.scoreExplanation: High CPA/TCPA violation probability with multiple converging traffic targets.
sources.positionConfidenceExplanation: Multi-source radar fusion with low bearing error and continuous track.

sources.name: Satellite Imagery
sources.scoreExplanation: Satellite imagery shows vessel shape inconsistent with reported AIS metadata.
sources.positionConfidenceExplanation: High-resolution satellite capture matched to reported coordinates within 50 meters.
